backend_address_pool.description: A list of backend address pools.
backend_address_pool.type: list(object({name : string, fqdns : list(string), ip_addresses : list(string)}))

backend_http_settings.description: A list of backend HTTP settings.
backend_http_settings.type: list(object({name : string, path: string, port : number, protocol : string, request_timeout : number, affinity_cookie_name: string, probe_name: string, host_name: string, drain_timeout_sec: number}))

enable_http2.description: Enable or disable HTTP/2 support for the application gateway.

fips_enabled.description: Enable or disable FIPS (Federal Information Processing Standards) compliance.

firewall_policy_id.description: The ID of the firewall policy to associate with the application gateway.

force_firewall_policy_association.description: Force the association of a firewall policy with the application gateway.

frontend_ip_configuration.description: A list of frontend IP configurations.
frontend_ip_configuration.type: list(object({name : string, public_ip_address_id : string, private_ip_address : string, subnet_id : string, private_ip_address_allocation: string}))

gateway_ip_configuration.description: A list of gateway IP configurations.

http_listener.type: list(object({name : string, frontend_ip_configuration_name : string, frontend_port_name : string, protocol : string, host_name: string, require_sni: bool, ssl_certificate_name: string}))

name.description: The name of the application gateway.

sku.type: list(object({name: string, tier: string, capacity: number}))

request_routing_rule.description: A list of request routing rules.
request_routing_rule.type: list(object({name : string, rule_type : string, priority : number, http_listener_name : string, backend_address_pool_name : string, backend_http_settings_name : string, redirect_configuration_name: string, url_path_map_name: string}))

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the application gateway.

zones.description: The availability zones to which the application gateway should be deployed.

identity_ids.description: Specifies a list of User Assigned Managed Identity IDs to be assigned to this Application Gateway.

ssl_certificates.type: list(object({name: string, data: string, password: string, key_vault_secret_id: string}))
ssl_certificates.description: List of SSL Certificates to use for this Gateway

probes.type: list(object({name: string, interval: number, path: string, protocol: string, timeout: number, unhealthy_threshold: number, host: string, port: number, pick_host_name_from_backend_http_settings: bool}))

redirect_configurations.type: list(object({name: string, redirect_type: string, target_listener_name: string, target_url: string, include_path: bool, include_query_string: bool}))

autoscale_min_capacity.description: Minimum capacity for autoscaling. Accepted values are in the range 0 to 100. Not required if you want to enable autoscaling

autoscale_max_capacity.description: Maximum capacity for autoscaling. Accepted values are in the range 0 to 100. Required if you want to enable autoscaling

url_path_maps.type: list(object({name: string, default_backend_http_settings_name: string, default_backend_address_pool_name: string, path_rules: list(object({name: string, backend_address_pool_name: string, backend_http_settings_name: string, paths: list(string)}))}))
url_path_maps.description: List of URL Path Maps for this resource.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
